Now booking for Q2 2025

I build websites that
actually get you customers

Most local businesses have websites that load in 4+ seconds, look like they're from 2015, and don't show up on Google. I fix that — with blazing-fast, premium sites built to book appointments and rank locally.

Start Your Project View My Work
0.3sAvg load time
100Lighthouse score
3xMore bookings
The Problem

Your website is costing you money

4.2s

Slow load times

The average local business website takes 4+ seconds to load. Google says 53% of visitors leave if it takes longer than 3 seconds. That's half your traffic — gone.

72%

Not mobile-friendly

72% of consumers search for local businesses on their phone. If your site doesn't look and work perfectly on mobile, you're invisible to most of your potential customers.

#0

Invisible on Google

If you're not on page 1 for "nail salon near me" or "barber in [your city]," you don't exist. Most Wix and Squarespace sites can't compete on local SEO.

My Work

Sites that perform

Luxe Nail Studio
Beauty & Wellness

Luxe Nail Studio

Complete rebrand and website build for a premium nail studio. 5-page site with online booking integration.

340% increase in online bookings
Iron & Blade Barbershop
Barbershop

Iron & Blade Barbershop

Bold, high-energy single-page site with service menu, gallery, and booking system.

First page Google ranking in 6 weeks
Balance Studio
Yoga & Pilates

Balance Studio

Clean, calming multi-page site with class schedule, instructor bios, and student testimonials.

200+ new student sign-ups in 3 months
GroundWork Coffee
Café & Restaurant

GroundWork Coffee

Fast, minimal site with menu, hours, location, and Instagram integration.

2x foot traffic from Google Maps
How It Works

From zero to live in 2 weeks

01

Discovery Call

15-minute call to understand your business, goals, and what's not working with your current site. I'll show you what's possible.

02

Design & Build

I pick the perfect template from my library, customize it to your brand, load your content, and wire up booking/contact forms.

03

Review & Launch

You review the site, I make revisions until you're thrilled, then launch it on blazing-fast hosting with SSL and a custom domain.

04

Grow & Optimize

Monthly maintenance, Google Business optimization, analytics reporting, and ongoing tweaks to keep you ranking and booking.

Client Love

What my clients say

"Our old website was embarrassing. Karan built us something that looks like we spent $20K. Online bookings tripled in the first month."

MR
Maria RosalesLuxe Nail Studio, LA

"I was paying $300/month for a Squarespace site that loaded in 6 seconds. Now I pay $149 for a site that loads in 0.3 seconds and I'm on page 1 of Google."

MC
Marcus ColeIron & Blade Barbershop

"He finished the whole site in 10 days. I was expecting months. The quality is insane — I've sent him 4 referrals already."

LC
Lila ChenBalance Studio, Santa Monica

customers to a bad website?
